← Lobby
First to 100

Dice Royale 🎲

Player 1
0
— turn pot: 0 —
Player 2
0
waiting…
Player 1, roll the dice!
Goal: Be first to reach 100 points. On your turn, roll two dice and add the sum to your turn pot. Keep rolling to grow the pot, then bank it to lock those points in and pass the dice.
⚠️ Roll a single 1 → lose the pot and your turn ends. Roll double 1s (snake eyes) → your whole score resets to 0! Roll any other double → the pot is doubled. Press your luck.
